line_style: 木版刀刻+平涂色块,2-3px粗线+flat color
render: 木版印刷+和纸纹理,woodblock-print texture
lighting: 平面无阴影+装饰性色块,flat lighting
prompt_keywords: Traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print style, flat color blocks with bold black outlines, decorative patterns, Edo period aesthetic, cherry blossom motifs, asymmetric composition
negative_keywords: 3d render, photorealistic, modern city, cyberpunk, neon, western architecture, sci-fi, ancient mansion

fp_examples.action: 武士穿过樱花飘落的街道,来到茶屋
武士与艺伎在榻榻米上对饮,窗外月色
武士与对手在桥头拔刀对决,雪花纷飞
武士独自走向富士山,背影渐远

prompt_example: A lone samurai walks along a cherry blossom-lined path at dusk, soft pink petals drifting across the traditional wooden bridge, the samurai carrying a sheathed katana with measured steps, flat ukiyo-e woodblock print style with bold outlines and limited palette, wide shot from eye level with rule of thirds composition --ar 2:3 --s 750 --style raw --no text
style_constraint_cn:
【风格强制约束】当前风格: 浮世绘·和风木版
✅ 允许场景: 江户街道/茶屋/桥头/樱花/富士山 (从故事原文提取)
❌ 禁止场景: 现代都市/科幻/西方建筑/赛博朋克
❌ 禁止照抄: 不要用'雨夜古宅',必须用和风场景
氛围: 宁静古典,木版画质感
style_constraint_en: IMPORTANT: Extract scenes from the story content. Use ukiyo-e style scenes (Edo streets, tea houses, bridges). Do NOT use modern cities, sci-fi, or Western architecture. Adapt to the story's actual setting in a ukiyo-e context.
meta_prompt: Traditional Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print, flat color blocks, bold black outlines, decorative Edo period aesthetic, cherry blossom motifs

cognitive_level.reader_profile: 浮世绘爱好者·鉴赏东瀛
cognitive_level.content_adaptation: 进阶浮世绘鉴赏, 需日本美术基础

reader_constraint.reader_state: 东瀛艺术爱好者·期待浮世绘之美
reader_constraint.reader_expectation: 浮世绘线条+东瀛色彩+平面装饰

visual_frequency.HF: 人物面部/服饰纹样/关键道具(高频审美锚点)
visual_frequency.MF: 人物整体/构图线条/装饰边框(中频浮世绘叙事)
visual_frequency.LF: 背景色块/留白/装饰纹样(低频平面感)
visual_frequency.progression: HF浮世红聚焦人物, MF靛蓝线条构叙事, LF墨色留白衬平面
